name: @onda-engine/wasm
description: The ONDA renderer compiled to WebAssembly — the real native engine in the browser (no DOM, no Chromium).

scripts.build: cargo build -p onda-wasm --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen ../../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/onda_wasm.wasm --out-dir pkg --target web
